subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who believed in the Spirit in His days and was seized by the fragrances of the days from his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی آمن بالروح فی ایامه و اخذته نفحات الایام من ربه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
